results.notes: Manual review identified the expired session issue after inspecting validate_session, but did not provide structured traceability.
AI review identified three relevant risks, but did not provide accountability or final validation.
AI suggestions were reviewed by a human. Two were accepted and one was partially accepted, with justification and audit log entries.

best_mode.reason: This mode achieved the best balance between relevant findings, useful test suggestions, human validation and traceability.
